name: DPDP - Payment Confirmation Email

parameters.subject: Payment confirmed — your DPDP report is being generated
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.business_name }},

Your payment of ₹999 has been confirmed! Claude AI is now analysing your DPDP compliance assessment.

Your report will be ready in about 30 seconds. You can access it here:

View Your DPDP Compliance Report →

Bookmark this link — it works forever for re-access.

— DPDP Checker Team

notes: Triggered by backend when Dodo webhook confirms payment. Payload: {email, business_name, report_url, assessment_id}
